scripts.build:www: cd src/www && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: node scripts/write-build-version.mjs && npm run-script build:www && npm run-script build:frontend && npm run-script build:backend
scripts.bundle:platform-deps: node scripts/stage-squint-runtime.mjs && node scripts/bundle-platform-yjs.mjs && node scripts/bundle-platform-rxjs.mjs
scripts.vercel-build: npm install && npm run bundle:platform-deps && (cd src/frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps) && (cd src/www && npm install) && node scripts/apply-pending-migrations.mjs && node --import tsx scripts/seed-fixtures.mjs && node scripts/write-build-version.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/stage-squint-runtime.mjs && node scripts/stage-platform-deps.mjs && node scripts/verify-frontend-bundle.mjs && node scripts/sync-public-assets.mjs
